title: Glitter XP
description: A small texture pack that changes XP into glittery stars with an XP bottle to match!
body:
![A golden XP potion bottle sits on top of grass surrounded by sparkling gold XP.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa8fa4209b291714fbce9b81e10446067e60577d_0.webp)

## ✨ CONTENTS:

This small resource pack changes the textures for XP.
- **XP orbs** get turned into cute glittery sparkles!
- The XP potion bottle (**Bottle o' Enchanting**) is also gold to match its contents!


## 💡 NOTES:

Requires [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) in order to work.

For now I've only tested it on the current listed version of Minecraft, however it should still work on other recent versions before that. 

Feel free to add this to your modpacks if you'd like! All I ask for is to be given credit. :)
